name: Cucumber Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Coarsely grate the cucumber (1 large or 2 small) that have been peeled, halved, and seeded. Gently squeeze by hand to remove excess liquid. Set aside.
2. On a cutting board, chop the garlic coarsely and sprinkle with salt. Using the flat side of a chopping knife, work the salted garlic into a paste.
3. In a medium-sized bowl, whisk together the garlic paste, yogurt, and mint.
4. Stir in the reserved cucumbers.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
